name: Shanghai Phichem Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Phichem Material Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells specialty chemicals and materials for various industries worldwide. The company offers primary and secondary coating materials for optical fibers; coating materials for buffered optical fibers; coloring inks for optical fibers and cables; matrix materials for optical fiber ribbons; and high- and low-refractive index coating materials for optical fibers. It also provides electronic materials, including conformal coating, etching chemicals, and PCB solder masks for printed wiring board fabrication, IC packaging, and integrated circuit manufacturing. In addition, the company offers raw materials, intermediate materials, single-component liquid crystals, and liquid-crystal mixtures, as well as release coating materials. Further, it provides specialty resins, intermediates, and additives. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Shanghai, China.
